## TL;DR
On-call engineers next 6 months would oppose Plan X — it doubles paging surface during transition.
[stance: oppose]

## Argument
On-call window for the migration period (~6 months) gets two new alert sources from
Plan X: the legacy-write-shadow path and the new dual-write reconciliation. We
currently page ~2x/week; Plan X likely takes us to ~5x/week for the transition.
Red-line: anything that takes weekly page count above 4.
